name: Buffalo Chicken Wings#4
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Miracle Whip and sour cream in a bowl.
2. Crumble the blue cheese into the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Cut celery into sticks.
4. Chop onion and mince garlic.
5. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Cook onion until soft, about 2 minutes.
6. Add garlic and cook for one more minute.
7. Squeeze lemon juice into the skillet.
8. Stir in tomato sauce, Tabasco, and salt. Cook for 5 minutes.
9. Remove wing tips from chicken wings. Cut remaining wings at the joint.
10. Heat oil for deep frying to 375°F (190°C).
11. Fry wings until brown, about 8 minutes.
12. Toss cooked wings in the tomato mixture.
13. Serve with chilled celery sticks and blue cheese dressing.
